mapper.select: SELECT id, steering_id, version, title, content, tags, keywords, change_log, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM steering_version WHERE steering_id = #{steeringId} ORDER BY version DESC
SELECT MAX(version) FROM steering_version WHERE steering_id = #{steeringId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM steering_version WHERE steering_id = #{steeringId}

SELECT id, steering_id, version, title, content, tags, keywords, change_log, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM steering_version WHERE steering_id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE steering_version SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, tags = #{tags}, keywords = #{keywords}, change_log = #{changeLog}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
